[正面] This is the most generous and exciting gacha I've ...
items.summary: This is the most generous and exciting gacha I've ever played. After the 2.0 update, their english translation became better and I hope it continues to get better. I love the story, the character designs, and I love the events. I love this game and I'm so sad I had to leave because of some personal issues (my laptop was dying) but god I'm so glad to be back to Morimens because THESE DESIGNS ARE INCREDIBLE AND IM SO IN LOVE WITH ALL OF THESE CHARACTERS!!! THAIS MY BELOVED!! I also need to learn who this Juliette is...
